title: Stable Ventilation
tip: Ventilating the stable is recommended today due to increased humidity.
description: High humidity can cause respiratory problems in animals and promote bacterial growth.
voice: Stable ventilation is recommended due to increased humidity.

title: Cleaning Water Troughs
tip: Regular cleaning of water troughs reduces the risk of infections.
description: Dirty water increases the risk of bacterial diseases in livestock.
voice: Clean water troughs regularly to reduce the risk of infections.

title: Minerals in Nutrition
tip: Adding minerals to nutrition improves animal resistance.
description: Minerals help strengthen immunity and support proper body development.

title: Fresh Water
description: Adequate water intake improves milk production and animal health.
voice: Provide fresh water for better livestock productivity.

title: Temperature Control
tip: Temperature control reduces stress in animals.
description: High temperatures can cause reduced appetite and lower production.
voice: Temperature control reduces stress in animals.
